notes: User reviewed v15 render and reported four remaining transition issues.
Mapped the notes to card ids: card-072 Eric Singleton Jr. autograph hold, card-075 Gunner Stockton Acropolis reveal, card-076 Houston Clement reveal, and card-079 Ethan Vasko reveal.
Keep global pacing unchanged; apply only per-card reveal-tail/hold corrections.

reviews.note: V15 render note: after Malik/Jayden, the Eric Singleton Jr. autograph did not show as a clean hit. Keep the reviewed reveal start, then jump the final-card hold to the clean autograph display around 17:40.8 and hold it longer.
V15 render note: Jerrick Gibson into Gunner Stockton Acropolis felt a little too fast. Preserve the reveal start but extend the tail until the Acropolis insert settles.

V15 render note: Gunner Stockton Acropolis into Houston Clement felt too fast. The prior window ended before the visible slide; move to the actual upward motion and carry through the settled Houston card.
V15 render note: Harrison Wallace III into Ethan Vasko was slightly too fast. Keep the reveal start and extend the landing by a few frames.
